transcript: Speaker A (AI): I go. Speaker B (Human): I went. Speaker A: I have. Speaker B: I had. Speaker A: I tell. Speaker B: I told. Speaker A: I know. Speaker B: I knew. Speaker A: I drive. Speaker B: I drove. Speaker A: I take. Speaker B: I took. Speaker A: I buy. Speaker B: I bought. Speaker A: I think. Speaker B: I thought. Speaker A: I make. Speaker B: I made. Speaker A: I eat. Speaker B: I ate. Speaker A: I sleep. Speaker B: I slept. Speaker A: I write. Speaker B: I wrote. Speaker A: वाओ, तुम्हारी इंग्लिश तो बहुत अच्छी है। तुमने इंग्लिश बोलना कहाँ से सीखा? [Wow, your English is very good. Where did you learn to speak English?] Speaker B: मैंने MySivi ऐप पर सीखा। [I learned on MySivi app.] Speaker A: MySivi? Speaker B: हाँ, इसमें एक AI टीचर है जिसके साथ तुम डेली इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करके आराम से फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश बोलना सीख सकते हो। [Yes, it has an AI teacher with whom you can easily learn to speak fluent English by practicing daily.] Speaker A: महँगा तो नहीं है? [Is it not expensive?] Speaker B: नहीं नहीं, ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 से शुरू होता है। [No no, the trial starts at just ₹1.] Speaker A: फिर तो ये सबको लेना चाहिए। [Then everyone should get this.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Download MySivi app now.
on_screen_text: Present / Past / English Mastery Day 22 / I Go / I Went / I Have / I Had / I Tell / I Told / I Know / I Knew / I Drive / I Drove / I Take / I Took / I Buy / I Bought / I Think / I Thought / I Make / I Made / I Eat / I Ate / I Sleep / I Slept / I Write / I Wrote / TUMHARI ENGLISH TOH BAHUT ACHHI HAI TUMNE ENGLISH BOLNA KAHAN SE SIKHA / MANE MYSIVI APP PAR SIKHA / MYSIVI / HAAN ISME EK AI TEACHER HAI JISKE SAATH DAILY PRACTICE KARKE AARAAM SE FLUENT ENGLISH SEEKH SAKTE HO / MAHENGA TOH NAHI HAI / NAHI NAHI TRIAL SIRF EK RUPEE SE SHURU HOTA HAI / PHIR TOH YEH SABKO LENA CHAHIYE / MySivi Premium / LIMITED TIME OFFER / 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1 / Then ₹299/month / Autopay, cancel anytime / 1,200 learners purchased today / 24/7 AI English Teacher / 500+ Exercises and Lessons / Unlimited Access / MySivi English speaking app / Install Now
summary: An AI avatar and a human practice English verb tenses in a split-screen format. The human attributes his fluency to the MySivi app, highlighting its AI teacher and a ₹1 trial offer. The ad ends with a call to download the app.
